title: Snap Inc. Announces Third Quarter 2020 Financial Results
text:
Snap Inc. Announces Third Quarter 2020 Financial Results

Key Financial Metrics

Daily Active Users increased 18% year-over-year to 249 million. Revenue increased 52% year-over-year to $679 million. Adjusted earnings per share was 1 cent versus expected loss of 5 cents, beating Wall Street estimates.

Profitability Performance

Net loss was $200 million in Q3 2020, compared to $227 million in the prior year, showing improvement. Adjusted EBITDA was positive at $95 million, demonstrating the company's path toward profitability.

Business Momentum

The company exceeded expectations on both revenue and user growth, demonstrating strong advertiser demand and platform engagement. The results reflected broad-based strength across all advertising verticals and continued growth in both North America and international markets.

Q4 Outlook

Management provided guidance for Q4 2020, projecting revenue growth of 40-50% year-over-year, indicating sustained momentum heading into the holiday season.
